title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates:
Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates!
